About this item
Coffee Maker Machine for Home : Brew your favorite coffee and froth milk with this versatile coffee maker, equipped with an electric frother, coffee frother, and milk frother for a perfect cup every time.
1 Charge = 30 Frothy Coffees: Enjoy up to 30 frothy coffee servings on a single charge, delivering convenience and efficiency for everyday use.
Enhanced Motor: The powerful motor ensures fast and efficient frothing and blending, offering smoother, creamier results with every use.
Variety of Coffee Drinks: Make a wide range of coffee drinks, from cappuccinos to lattes, with this coffee maker, coffee blender, and frother combo, catering to all your coffee preferences.
Time-Saving & Easy to Clean: Brew coffee, froth milk, and clean easily with this all-in-one coffee beater electric, designed to save you time while ensuring a smooth, hassle-free experience.

Zohaib Ansari
5 out of 5 starsExcellent Milk Frother – Works Perfectly!
Reviewed in India on 31 May 2026
Colour: WHISKER
Verified Purchase
I’m very happy with this milk frother. It is easy to use, lightweight, and rechargeable. It creates smooth and creamy foam within seconds, making coffee, cappuccino, and hot chocolate taste much better. The build quality feels good for the price, and the battery backup is decent. Cleaning is also quick and simple. Overall, a great value-for-money product and highly recommended for coffee lovers.

5 out of 5 starsPowerful Frother with Type-C Charging
Reviewed in India on 13 June 2026
Colour: WHISKER
Verified Purchase
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐


Excellent coffee frother! The multiple frothing modes make it very versatile, whether I want light foam for coffee, thick foam for cappuccino, or mixing drinks. The Type-C charging is a huge convenience—no need to keep buying batteries. The battery life is impressive, and it charges quickly. It’s easy to use, powerful, and produces smooth, creamy foam in seconds. Great value for money and a must-have for coffee lovers!

Chirag verma
4 out of 5 starsWorks Great, Packaging Misleading
Reviewed in India on 14 June 2026
Colour: WHISKER
Verified Purchase
The packaging/cover is different from what is shown in the product images. Apart from that, everything works perfectly. The build quality is good, and the Type-C charging port is a great addition. It is suitable for making instant coffee, cappuccino, lassi, and other beverages.

The frother offers three different speed levels, which is very useful. Overall, it is a good and durable product.

Keep it out of reach of children.

Placeholder
5 out of 5 stars⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Excellent Milk Frother – Great Value for Money!
Reviewed in India on 31 May 2026
Colour: WHISKER
Verified Purchase
I've been using the Nova Milk Frother for a while now, and I'm very happy with its performance. It creates rich, creamy froth in just a few seconds, making my coffee, cappuccino, and cold lattes taste much better. The rechargeable battery is a huge advantage, as I don't need to keep replacing batteries.

The build quality feels solid, and the stainless-steel whisk is durable and easy to clean. It's lightweight, comfortable to hold, and powerful enough to mix protein shakes, hot chocolate, and eggs as well. The USB-C charging is convenient, and the battery lasts a long time on a single charge.

Overall, this is a reliable, efficient, and affordable milk frother that delivers café-style froth at home. Highly recommended for coffee lovers!
